历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1798 → 2564 → 6319 → 5914 → 5843. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (6319th place), while 2024–2025 gradually moved forward and stabilized, with a baseline of about 5843 in 2025, accumulating a forward shift of about 476 positions over the past two years. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, and the stable plan has a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 47th and 57th, overall in the top tier of domestic finance and economics institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation file does not include this university, and there have been no significant negative public opinions in recent years. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 91st, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms, and stable application attention.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, all A-/A level disciplines, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, Economics, and Foreign Language and Literature, with outstanding disciplinary strength. The popularity of finance/economics/economy majors in 2024 is assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', slightly warming compared to 2023, with top finance and economics institutions still attractive. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 2025 (172,114), with an estimated 113,894 physics category candidates (a decrease of about 3% from 117,407 in 2025), slightly easing competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Heilongjiang candidates. The enrollment plan in Heilongjiang is stable at around 24, accounting for a small proportion, and regional preference has a neutral to slightly positive impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical rankings that have moved forward and stabilized for two consecutive years after the abnormal backward shift in 2023, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in provincial physics category candidates (slightly easing competition), and a slight warming of major popularity, it is expected that the ranking will continue to move forward slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 5843. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5813, with a range of 5313–6313.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics (Honors Bachelor Experimental Class)
- Financial Engineering (Major Category Enrollment, including Financial Technology and the Joint Bachelor's Degree Program with BUPT in Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration Category (including Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration, with the opportunity to participate in the selection for the Joint Bachelor's Degree Program in Accounting with BUPT Computer Science/Financial Technology)
- Financial Mathematics
- Finance Category (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Insurance (all entering the Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Actuarial Science (with the opportunity to participate in the selection for the Actuarial Science - Labor and Social Security Dual Bachelor's Degree Program and the Actuarial and Risk Management Experimental Class)
- Digital Economy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 5313–6313, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Business Administration Category, Financial Mathematics, Finance Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Economics Honors Class, Financial Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Insurance, Actuarial Science, Digital Economy) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 5313), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 331 → 390 → 340 → 325 → 443. In 2025, it significantly dropped by 118 places compared to 2024 (from 325 to 443), indicating an abnormal fluctuation. The baseline for 2025 is about 443. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 18 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, remaining stable overall. The 2026 plan is 18, unchanged from 2025, and the stable plan has a neutral impact on competition. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 57th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating slightly between 47th and 57th, placing it among the top domestic finance and economics institutions.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation document does not include this university, and there have been no significant negative public incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranks 91st overall, rated as 'average,' with low exposure on short video platforms and stable application attention. Applied Economics is rated A, Business Administration A, and Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all at the A-/A level. These disciplines directly correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, Business Administration, and Foreign Languages and Literature, highlighting strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of finance/economics/business majors in 2024 is assessed as 'divergent and wait-and-see,' slightly warming up compared to 2023. Top finance and economics institutions still hold strong appeal for liberal arts students. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 167,000, a decrease of approximately 3% from 2025 (172,114). The estimated number of history category examinees is about 53,106 (a decrease of about 2.9% from 54,707 in 2025), slightly easing competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Heilongjiang examinees. The enrollment plan for liberal arts in Heilongjiang is stable at around 18, and regional preference has a neutral to slightly positive impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal drop in 2025 rankings (odd-even year effect), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in history category examinees in the province (slightly easing competition), and a slight warming of major popularity, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will move forward to a normal level. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 423, with a range of 323–523.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law Category (Law, eligible for selection into the Law-Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or the International Excellent Economic and Trade Legal Talent Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Finance Category (Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (close to 323), you can prioritize Tier 1 Law majors.
